nodes.description: UE sends REGISTRATION REQUEST to AMF
UE has T3502 and T3511 stopped (if running)
UE has T3519 running (if SUCI included and T3519 not running)
Network performs authentication and security procedures
AMF sends REGISTRATION ACCEPT to UE
UE stores received TAI list and deletes old one
UE enters 5GMM-REGISTERED state, resets attempt counter, sets 5GS update status to 5U1 UPDATED
UE sends REGISTRATION COMPLETE to AMF (if conditions met)
AMF stops T3550 and enters 5GMM-REGISTERED state
AMF sends REGISTRATION REJECT to UE

edges.description: UE initiates registration
UE starts timer T3510
UE stops timers T3502 and T3511 (if running)
If SUCI included and T3519 not running, UE starts T3519
Network may initiate authentication and security procedures
Network may initiate authentication and security procedures
Initial registration request accepted by network
Initial registration request cannot be accepted by network
UE receives REGISTRATION ACCEPT
If 5G-GUTI or SOR transparent container IE is included in REGISTRATION ACCEPT
If Operator-defined access category definitions IE, the Extended emergency number list IE, the CAG information list IE or the Extended CAG information list IE are included in the REGISTRATION ACCEPT
If UE set RCMAP bit and Negotiated PEIPS assistance information IE is included in REGISTRATION ACCEPT
If UE is not in NB-N1 mode, UE set RACS bit and UE radio capability ID IE or UE radio capability ID deletion indication IE is included in REGISTRATION ACCEPT
UE receives REGISTRATION ACCEPT
UE receives REGISTRATION ACCEPT
If Network slicing indication IE with Network slicing subscription change indication set to "Network slicing subscription changed" is included in REGISTRATION ACCEPT
If UE set RCMAN bit and NSAG information IE is included in REGISTRATION ACCEPT
If REGISTRATION ACCEPT contains Operator-defined access category definitions IE, the Extended emergency number list IE ,the CAG information list IE or the Extended CAG information list IE
If UE set RCMAP bit and Negotiated PEIPS assistance information IE is included in REGISTRATION ACCEPT
If REGISTRATION ACCEPT contains UE radio capability ID IE or UE radio capability ID deletion indication IE
AMF receives REGISTRATION COMPLETE
UE receives REGISTRATION REJECT
